# MuleSoft Azure Service Bus Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.6) of Azure Service Bus Connector documentation.
> See [Azure Service Bus Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Azure Service Bus Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Azure Service Bus Connector 3.6 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/latest/azure-service-bus-connector-examples.md)
- [Azure Service Bus Connector 3.6 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/latest/azure-service-bus-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Azure Service Bus Connector 3.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/latest/azure-service-bus-connector-studio.md)
- [Azure Service Bus Connector 3.6 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/latest/azure-service-bus-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Azure Service Bus Connector 3.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/latest/index.md)
